accurate.why: All claims accurately reflect the bill text; the note that it does not amend the Stafford Act is accurate.

no_hallucinations.why: No fabricated claims; all specific provisions match the bill.

states_purpose.why: Clearly identifies the purpose as requiring federal review and reporting on FEMA disability assistance.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Correctly notes the Act does not amend existing statutes.

major_provisions_covered.why: Covers both reporting requirements with their specific content, including the physical disabilities scope in the review.

concise.why: Quite detailed, nearly restating the full bill text rather than summarizing.

correct_entities.why: FEMA, Comptroller General, House Transportation and Infrastructure Committee, and Senate Homeland Security Committee all correctly identified.

judged_via: claude-sonnet-4-6 via parallel Claude Code subagents (web/knowledge-verified context)
